fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description for the production BOM.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies an extended description for the BOM if there is not enough space in the Description field.

fields.name: Search Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies an alternate name that you can use to search for the record in question when you cannot remember the value in the Name field.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the manufacturing batch unit of measure.

fields.name: Low-Level Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the level in which this BOM is used.
The low-level Code identifies the lowest level of use of an item.
If the item functions as a production BOM, then the production BOM header will have the value 1 as the low-level code of the item. If the production BOM is a components of another production BOM, then the two production BOM headers will have the same low-level code.
This information is required when calculating a plan.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip:
Specifies whether there is a comment for this BOM.
To view a comment or create a new one, click Related Information, point to Prod. BOM, and then click Comments. A window appears that displays existing comments and allow you to create new ones.
You can also enter a comment in the Notes FactBox. Notes follow documents when they are posted in the same way as comments.
The program automatically returns the entry to the Comment field if there is an entry in the Comments window.
You cannot edit or delete the contents of this field.

fields.name: Creation Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the creation date.
The creation date is the day on which this production BOM was created.
If you create a production BOM and do not fill it in with data immediately, the day on which the empty data set was created is still shown here.

fields.name: Last Date Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last date that was modified.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the production BOM.

fields.name: Version Nos.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the version number series that the production BOM versions refer to.

fields.name: No. Series
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number series to which this production BOM refers.
